questions.question: Paul says God saved us not because of works done by us but according to what?
questions.feedback: God saved us not because of our works but according to his own mercy.

questions.question: What does Paul tell Titus to avoid?
questions.feedback: Avoid foolish controversies, genealogies, dissensions, and quarrels about the law.

questions.question: Paul says believers should be ready for every good work.
questions.feedback: Paul reminds Titus that believers should be submissive, obedient, and ready for every good work.

questions.question: God saved us through the washing of regeneration and renewal of the Holy _____.
questions.feedback: God saved us by the washing of regeneration and renewal of the Holy Spirit.

questions.question: Paul says to warn a divisive person once, then twice, and after that have nothing more to do with _____.
questions.feedback: Warn a divisive person once, then twice, then avoid him.
